{{CargoRelic
|name=Bayesian Network
|class_id=22600
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=06-06
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Jun 6, 1988 AD, American computer scientist Pearl proposed his own theoretical model.<br>Bayesian networks, also known as belief networks, are an extension of Bayesian methods and one of the most effective theoretical models in the field of uncertain knowledge reasoning. Bayesian networks themselves are a kind of uncertain causal relationship model, which uses conditional probabilities to express the relationships between different information elements and can learn and reason under limited, incomplete, and uncertain information conditions. Nowadays, Bayesian networks have been widely used in expert systems, statistical decision making, and learning and prediction fields.
|fame=43
|art=37
|fth=50
|civ=40
|tech=73
|ss1=W-tads collected from Drill Rig +30<br>Per Goldfishes Calculation LVL, Snail DEF +3<br>Goldfishes Calculation: 50/50
|ss2=W-tads collected from Drill Rig +40<br>Per Goldfishes Calculation LVL, Snail DEF +4<br>Goldfishes Calculation: 50/50
|ss3=W-tads collected from Drill Rig +50<br>Per Goldfishes Calculation LVL, Snail DEF +5<br>Goldfishes Calculation: 50/50
|ss4=W-tads collected from Drill Rig +70<br>Per Goldfishes Calculation LVL, Snail DEF +7<br>Goldfishes Calculation: 50/50
|ss5=W-tads collected from Drill Rig +90<br>Per Goldfishes Calculation LVL, Snail DEF +9<br>Goldfishes Calculation: 50/50
|ss7=W-tads collected from Drill Rig +90<br>Per Goldfishes Calculation LVL, Snail DEF +9<br>Goldfishes Calculation: 50/50<br>W-tads collected from Drill Rig +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Frostsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: This Relic's TECH +10
|skill2=[[File:Frostsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: Frost Sanctum, Glorium Cap +15%
}}
